{{Quote|Nothing unusual at Bilbringi. Tenel Ka and Jovan Drark have stationed themselves in public places, looking for dead spots in the Force that could be Yuuzhan Vong in masquers.|Luke Skywalker|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Balance Point">''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]''</ref>}}
'''Jovan Drark''' was a male [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], known for his withdrawn personality. A year into the war, Jovan joined [[Tenel Ka Djo]] on a mission to monitor the [[Bilbringi system/Legends|Bilbringi system]].

He was later one of the members of the [[Myrkr strike team]]. As the teams' [[Sniper/Legends|sniper]], he was armed with a high-powered [[Longblaster/Legends|longblaster]]. He lost his life due to a combination of being bitten by [[flitnat]]s and a large wound to his chest inflicted by a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Warrior caste|warrior]]. One of his abilities was [[Telekinesis/Legends#Force Wave|Force Wave]].
